# GamerDex

> GamerDex is a collection of game tracker companions that help you catalog, track, and complete your favorite games.

GamerDex provides dedicated tracking tools for individual games. Each tracker is a standalone companion app tailored to a specific game's content — collectibles, progress milestones, and completion checklists.

## Supported Games

- Dinkum — track your progress in the Australian-themed life sim
- Stardew Valley — catalog your farm, bundles, and collectibles
- Supermarket Simulator — track your store management progress

## Site

- Homepage: https://gamerdex.app
- Sitemap: https://gamerdex.app/sitemap.xml
